query:
SELECT pipelineStage, COUNT(*) as count FROM recruitment_prospects GROUP BY pipelineStage ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM recruitment_prospects;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT pipelineStage, COUNT(*) as count FROM recruitment_prospects GROUP BY pipelineStage ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM recruitment_prospects;
